message.content:
Test file: src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts
Passing tests: 6
Recent changes: Test 6 implemented; added reproduction rule to find dead cells with exactly 3 neighbors and create them

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to next test after completion.

content.text: I'll perform the refactor phase for the Game of Life implementation. Let me start by examining the current test and implementation files.
Now let me verify that all tests pass before refactoring:
